name: Open Day / Peers 2026
description: Khoj is delighted to host the Peers 2026 Open Day on Friday, 3rd July at 6:00 PM onwards at Khoj Studios – S17, Khirkee Extension. Now in its 22nd edition, Peers continues to serve as a springboard for emerging artists at a pivotal moment in their practice.
